headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 28, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, led by Daniel Schneemann's home run and two RBIs. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 4-2, with JJ Wetherholt's home run and 1 RBI leading the offense. The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays 5-0, with Ranger Suarez pitching 8.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and no earned runs.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Tanner Murray, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list by the Chicago White Sox due to a left shoulder dislocation. The Toronto Blue Jays have also been affected, with Max Scherzer being placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 25, 2026, due to right forearm tendinitis and left ankle inflammation.

The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash, while the Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Guardians in Thrilling 3-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays took down the Cleveland Guardians 3-2, securing a narrow win. Daniel Schneemann led the Rays' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Pirates 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with JJ Wetherholt leading the offense with a home run and 1 RBI. Ryan Fernandez earned the win with 2 scoreless innings, striking out 4 batters.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Shut Out Blue Jays 5-0**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays, securing a 5-0 victory. Ranger Suarez led the way on the mound, pitching 8.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Fall to Twins in 11-4 Rout**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Seattle Mariners, securing a 11-4 victory. Kody Clemens led the Twins' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **White Sox Place Tanner Murray on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago White Sox left fielder Tanner Murray has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The injury occurred on April 27, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash.
